links.title: 🔍 Explore Traces
links.tooltip: Open Grafana Explore with Jaeger traces

panels.title: Reasoning Tokens
panels.description: Chain-of-thought tokens from o-series, Claude extended thinking, and Gemini 2.5+ thinking. Stays at 0 for non-reasoning workflows; surfaces non-zero only when ``gen_ai_token_type="reasoning"`` observations are emitted.

panels.title: Tokens (input · output · reasoning)
panels.description: Token volume split by direction. The ``reasoning`` series surfaces chain-of-thought tokens from o-series, Claude extended thinking, and Gemini 2.5+ thinking. Series only appear once a workflow has emitted that direction.

panels.title: Cost per workflow
panels.description: Cumulative spend per workflow, sourced from ``agentloom_cost_usd_total``. The metric already accounts for reasoning tokens at the output rate (``calculate_cost`` sums them into ``output_tokens`` before applying the per-model price), so reasoning-heavy workflows render accurately without a separate series. Per-provider / per-model breakdowns are tracked separately via ``gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum``.

panels.title: Approval Decisions
panels.description: Approval gate decisions over time by outcome

panels.title: Mock Replays
panels.description: MockProvider lookups, by how the response was matched

panels.title: Replay Hit Ratio
panels.description: Fraction of mock lookups that found a recorded response (not the default)

panels.title: Recording Captures by Provider
panels.description: Real provider responses captured by RecordingProvider

panels.title: Captured Real-Provider Latency (p50 / p95)
panels.description: Latency of the real provider calls that RecordingProvider captured — what replay will simulate with latency_model=replay

panels.title: Streamed Responses
panels.description: Total streamed LLM responses per provider

panels.title: Streaming Ratio
panels.description: Percentage of LLM calls using streaming

panels.title: Stream vs Batch Duration
panels.description: Average step duration: streamed vs batch

panels.title: Recent Traces
panels.description: Latest workflow traces from Jaeger. Click a Trace ID to view the full span tree.
